text:
{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <SELLER>Bey Herrn Daniel Hag dem Buchbinder</SELLER>
    <BOOKS>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Justi Lipsii</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Epistolarum Centuriae complet</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <PUBLISHER>apud Plautin</PUBLISHER>
            <PRIZE>1. Gulden 36. xr.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Ejusdem</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Politicorum Libri</TITLE>
            <WORKS>
                <WORK>
                    <TITLE>Monita</TITLE>
                    <VOLUME>8e Exempla politica</VOLUME>
                </WORK>
                <WORK>
                    <TITLE>De Magnirudine Romana</TITLE>
                </WORK>
                <WORK>
                    <TITLE>De Constantia</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
                    <PUBLISHER>ibid</PUBLISHER>
                    <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 36.</PRIZE>
                </WORK>
            </WORKS>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Ejusdem</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>de Militia Romana cum An.fig.</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <PUBLISHER>ibid</PUBLISHER>
            <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 30.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Ejusdem</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Poliorecticon de Machinis, Tormentis, Telis cum An.fig.</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <PUBLISHER>ibid</PUBLISHER>
            <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 12.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Ejusdem</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>de Amphitheatro</TITLE>
            <WORKS>
                <WORK>
                    <TITLE>de Amphitheatris extra Romam, cum An.fig.</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
                    <PUBLISHER>ibid</PUBLISHER>
                    <PRIZE>30. xr.</PRIZE>
                </WORK>
            </WORKS>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Ejusdem</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Dissert. apud Principes Se C.Plinii Panegyricus cum Commentar.</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <PUBLISHER>ibid</PUBLISHER>
            <PRIZE>48. xr.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>C. Corn. Taciti & Velleji Paterculi</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Opera cum Lipsii Commentariis</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>Folio</FORMAT>
            <PUBLISHER>ibid</PUBLISHER>
            <PRIZE>fl. 3.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Opera cum Notis Integris W. Heinsii & variorum</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <VOLUME>3. Theil</VOLUME>
            <PLACE>Lugd.</PLACE>
            <PRIZE>fl. 7. xr. 12.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Gotthard Heideggers</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Kleinere Teutsche Schrifften</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <YEAR>1732</YEAR>
            <PRIZE>30. xr.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Delicia Urbis Bernae</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <YEAR>1732</YEAR>
            <PRIZE>13. xr.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Vernunftmäßige Untersuchung des Baades zu Baden, mit Kupfern</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <YEAR>1732</YEAR>
            <PRIZE>11. xr.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Vernunftmäßige Untersuchung des Baades zu Baden, ohne Kupfern</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <YEAR>1732</YEAR>
            <PRIZE>4. Batzen</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Johann Milton</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Verlust des Paradieses</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <YEAR>1732</YEAR>
            <PRIZE>14. xr.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Paragone della Poesia Tragica Italiana e quella di Francia</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <YEAR>1732</YEAR>
            <PRIZE>5. Batzen</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>J. J. Breitingeri</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>in Versus obscuriss. Persii diatribe Historico Literaria</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <YEAR>1723</YEAR>
            <PRIZE>1. Batzen</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Discurse der Mahleren</TITLE>
            <VOLUME>4. Theil</VOLUME>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <YEAR>1731</YEAR>
            <PRIZE>16. xr.</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
    </BOOKS>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":20,"explanation":"1. Added root-level XML declaration.
2. Added <SELLER> tag to encapsulate the seller information.
3. Created a <BOOKS> container to group all book entries.
4. Fixed nested <BIBL> tags by restructuring into <BOOK> and <WORK> tags.
5. Corrected nested <BIBL> tags within <BIBL> tags by restructuring into <WORK> tags under <WORKS>.
6. Fixed malformed <AUTHOR> tags (e.g., 'Ejusd.' to 'Ejusdem').
7. Corrected malformed <TITLE> tags with special characters.
8. Added <PUBLISHER> tags for publisher information.
9. Fixed inconsistent <PRIZE> tags (e.g., 'PRICE' to 'PRIZE').
10. Corrected malformed <FORMAT> tags (e.g., 'Fol.' to 'Folio').
11. Fixed <VOLUME> and <YEAR> tags for consistency.
12. Corrected special characters (e.g., 'm�' to 'mäßige').
13. Fixed malformed <PLACE> tag.
14. Corrected inconsistent currency symbols and abbreviations.
15. Fixed nested structure for multiple works by the same author.
16. Added proper closing tags for all elements.
17. Corrected 'xr.' and 'x�fc' to 'xr.' and 'xr.' consistently.
18. Fixed 'fl.' to 'fl.' consistently.
19. Corrected 'Batzen' and 'Gulden' currency tags.
20. Ensured all elements are properly nested and closed."}

parsed.explanation:
1. Added root-level XML declaration.
2. Added <SELLER> tag to encapsulate the seller information.
3. Created a <BOOKS> container to group all book entries.
4. Fixed nested <BIBL> tags by restructuring into <BOOK> and <WORK> tags.
5. Corrected nested <BIBL> tags within <BIBL> tags by restructuring into <WORK> tags under <WORKS>.
6. Fixed malformed <AUTHOR> tags (e.g., 'Ejusd.' to 'Ejusdem').
7. Corrected malformed <TITLE> tags with special characters.
8. Added <PUBLISHER> tags for publisher information.
9. Fixed inconsistent <PRIZE> tags (e.g., 'PRICE' to 'PRIZE').
10. Corrected malformed <FORMAT> tags (e.g., 'Fol.' to 'Folio').
11. Fixed <VOLUME> and <YEAR> tags for consistency.
12. Corrected special characters (e.g., 'm�' to 'mäßige').
13. Fixed malformed <PLACE> tag.
14. Corrected inconsistent currency symbols and abbreviations.
15. Fixed nested structure for multiple works by the same author.
16. Added proper closing tags for all elements.
17. Corrected 'xr.' and 'x�fc' to 'xr.' and 'xr.' consistently.
18. Fixed 'fl.' to 'fl.' consistently.
19. Corrected 'Batzen' and 'Gulden' currency tags.
20. Ensured all elements are properly nested and closed.
